MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 611

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rufus Cole, Esq. (415-956-8800), appearing for Stephen Hewlett, Defendant/Cross-Complainant and moving party.
Jonathan Pickett, Esq. (415-767-5101), appearing for David J. Tint, Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant and opposing party.
Reporter Patti Rosinski, CSR #4555, (415-519-6207).

This matter comes on calendar today for motion to continue trial date, ON THE RECORD. Court hears arguments from both sides.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and heard arguments, rules as follows: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL is GRANTED. Trial date is continued to February 1, 2016 at 9:30am in Department 206. Discovery shall remain open until 30 days before the new trial date. Order is signed in open court.

Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Reporter Patti Rosinski, CSR #4555, (415-519-6207, (D611)
